title: Historical Identity Domain Schema Design

objective: Design the minimum upstream identity-domain schema needed to support the remaining deferred PM/work foreign keys by defining bounded users, employees, and crews structures, ownership boundaries, and FK-target contracts without authoring SQL or expanding into runtime implementation.
constrained_outputs: Minimum identity-domain table design for users, employees, and crews needed by deferred PM/work foreign keys

validation_steps: Confirm the design covers the remaining deferred PM/work identity foreign-key targets without reopening the completed org-domain chain

sql_permission_note: Packet 012a is planning-only. No identity SQL, schema changes, or runtime code changes are authorized.
